calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-24-2004 Reset To Aug-24-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-24-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Petitioner: Victoria Mary Elizabeth van Gerbig, present in pro per, was swron and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Eliza Isabella O van Gerbig.
Decree signed in open court.
